_comment: Fleet node models (16GB RAM, CPU-only Linux). Minimal set — only qwen3.5:4b fits reliably. All cloud requests route through A2A bridge to orchestrator. GAP-3.
_hardware: 16GB RAM, CPU-only (no GPU). i5-6400 4c (fnet1) / i7-8700 12c (fnet2) / i7-10710U 12c (fnet7). fnet2 has broken GTX 660 — treat as CPU-only.
_cloud_routing: Fleet nodes have NO direct cloud API access. Cloud requests go through A2A bridge to orchestrator. model-router.json uses 'cloud-via-a2a' placeholder for cloud routes.
_ram_constraint: 16GB RAM — only qwen3.5:4b (2.4GB disk) can run reliably alongside system services. All other work routes to cloud via A2A.

models._note: Local 4B vision — only viable local model on 16GB RAM. maxTokens 4096 per MAX-TOKENS-GUIDE. 262K ctx technically supported but practically capped by 16GB RAM.
